notas.titulo: This One-Of-A-Kind Koenigsegg Could Fetch $10 Million
notas.descripcion: This Koenigsegg One:1 is looking for a new owner. It’s one of six examples built, with 1,360 hp and just 2,630 miles on the odometer.

notas.titulo: Honda Racing Boss: 'Look Forward' To A More Hardcore Civic Type R
notas.descripcion: The Honda Civic Type R HRC Concept is debuting this year, according to HRC President Koji Watanabe.

notas.titulo: The Dodge Charger EV Got A Massive Price Hike
notas.descripcion: The entry-level, 420-horsepower Charger R/T has the same starting price as before at $49,995.
